**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**Sample text**
The exact text you pasted (a minimal snippet that reproduces it).

**Which rule(s) were enabled?**
e.g. General mechanics, AP, Pronoun overuse…

**Expected vs. actual**
What you expected to be flagged (or not), and what actually happened.
